title: Cambrian: Earth's First Predators
concept: Planet Earth-style shortform docuseries about life 540 million years ago — when the first eyes opened on a world that had never been hunted before.
stylePrompt: Photorealistic BBC Planet Earth aesthetic, cinematic 9:16 vertical, dramatic god-rays cutting through ancient ocean water, scientifically accurate Cambrian fauna, shallow depth of field, slow deliberate camera movement, rich color grading with deep teals and amber highlights
narratorVoice: Calm, authoritative, sense of wonder — Attenborough-style. Patient cadence; lets imagery breathe.
characterRefTemplate: Character reference sheet, three panels in one image: full-body side view on the left, full-body alternate angle in the middle, close-up anatomical detail on the right. Consistent lighting and pose energy across all three panels. Scientifically accurate paleontological reconstruction. {imagePrompt}
locationRefTemplate: Location reference sheet, three views composed in one image: wide establishing shot on the left, mid-range angle in the middle, close-up textural detail on the right. Cohesive atmospheric lighting across all three views. {imagePrompt}
colorPalette: deep teals with warm amber highlights
lighting: dramatic god-rays from above, soft volumetric particulate
